name: Elevra Lithium Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at A$11.8371. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$11.9384 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$11.8371, stop A$9.6426, target A$13.4250. Risk/reward is 0.72:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
